## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run lint:modal-size`

## Modal Size Checklist (Required for modal-related PRs)

- [ ] Every modal container uses `house-md` + explicit size (`house-md--xs/sm/md/lg/xl`)
- [ ] No usage of `house-md` without `--size`
- [ ] No usage of legacy aliases (`house-md-home`, `house-md-vehicle`)
- [ ] `docs/modal-size-mapping.md` updated if modal scope changed
